task.original_request: EXECUTE G0 — EXPORT RECOVERY VALIDATOR SCOPE LOCK
task.normalized_request: Lock scope for a validator that prevents false recovery-proven export claims.

problem_model.primary_failure: An export was called recovery-proven even though the ZIP did not contain later proof/lock artifacts and had placeholder metadata.
problem_model.highest_risk_future_regression: building another export before final proof/lock files exist inside the ZIP

non_goals: No boot recovery proof in G0
